ops.body: Third bullet from the round-3 refutation (codex, minor): a cross-request stale-delta race — with an empty commitment set, a staged plan for historical key K, and a new identical uncached occurrence of K, request R can apply the staged plan (uncommit path) while concurrent request F fresh-commits K; if R lands last upstream, the set retains K and the next lane render flips staged bytes back to lane bytes — one lossless-clean bust, self-healing. Root cause is concurrent same-session requests sharing SessionEcon without serialization; fix alongside the pricing inputs or via per-session request ordering.
